Mysterious incident involving two uniformed Border Patrol agents in marked vehicles and another in plain clothes in an unmarked pickup truck with police lights. A chain was attached to the unmarked truck and it was used to tow an SUV with Sonoran plates, which the Border Patrol agents described as a “stranded motorist”. But Border Patrol agents are not permitted to tow civilian vehicles with chains, so we think either this was also an unmarked Border Patrol vehicle or it was the “ghost car” of someone who had already been kidnapped.
